key_themes: Prolonged FY2025 audit delays with repeated updates and Nasdaq non-compliance notices
Strategic Palm Global merger and fintech pivot promising massive assets/stablecoins but involving extreme dilution (1.1B shares to be issued)
Raised FY2026 profit guidance (> $40M), debt elimination, and restructuring claims versus ongoing negative GAAP results and low cash
Multiple securities fraud investigations by law firms and high stock volatility with momentum-driven trader interest
summary: ABVE continues to highlight progress on its FY2025 audit, a clean balance sheet post-restructuring, raised profitability guidance above $40M for FY2026, debt elimination, and a high-profile Palm Global merger into gold-backed fintech/stablecoins (with notable backers and board additions). However, the audit remains unfinished well into 2026, triggering Nasdaq compliance issues, multiple securities fraud probes by law firms, and enormous dilution from issuing 1.1 billion shares. The biggest risk is what the delayed audit ultimately reveals or further delisting/regulatory action that could undermine the promotional claims. Recent X activity is mostly short-term momentum trading around volume and options rather than fundamental conviction.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ABVE/)[[2]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/ABVE)[[3]](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/01/3266666/0/en/Above-Food-Ingredients-Inc-Investigated-by-the-Portnoy-Law-Firm.html)
